  "plainEnglishExplanation": "The CI pipeline failed because a concrete build or validation error stopped the workflow before it could complete successfully.",

  "approvalMode": "fix_pr",

    "Do not commit directly to the original branch or main branch.",
    "Create a dedicated remediation branch for the proposed fix.",

  "impactOfNonApproval": "The failing branch remains unchanged, delivery stays blocked, and the same issue may recur without a recorded validated fix.",

  "safeMode": "No direct changes are pushed to the original branch. A remediation branch and draft PR are created for review."
}

name: AI Orchestrator Execution

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pr_number:
        description: "Pull request number"
        required: true
      execution_id:
        description: "Execution ID"
        required: true
      recommended_checks:
        description: "Comma-separated recommended checks"
        required: true
      provider:
        description: "Execution provider"
        required: true
      environment:
        description: "Target environment"
        required: true
        default: "dev"

jobs:
  orchestrator-execution:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Print execution context
        run: |
          echo "PR Number: ${{ inputs.pr_number }}"
          echo "Execution ID: ${{ inputs.execution_id }}"
          echo "Provider: ${{ inputs.provider }}"
          echo "Environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}"
          echo "Recommended Checks: ${{ inputs.recommended_checks }}"

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"

      - name: Run orchestrator checks
        run: |
          node .github/workflows/scripts/run-orchestrator-checks.js "${{ inputs.recommended_checks }}" ".orchestrator.yml"

      - name: Complete execution
        run: |
          echo "AI Orchestrator execution completed"

version: 1

project:
  name: ai-orchestrator-demo-repo
  defaultWorkingDirectory: apps/api

checks:
  api_dependency_install:
    description: Install API dependencies
    workingDirectory: apps/api
    commands:
      - npm install

  api_build_validation:
    description: Run API TypeScript build validation
    workingDirectory: apps/api
    commands:
      - npm install
      - npm run build

  api_unit_tests:
    description: Run API demo test scenarios
    workingDirectory: apps/api
    commands:
      - npm install
      - npm test

  integration_tests:
    description: Run demo integration checks against the API package
    workingDirectory: apps/api
    commands:
      - npm install
      - npm test

  web_dependency_install:
    description: Install web dependencies
    workingDirectory: apps/web
    commands:
      - npm install

  web_build_validation:
    description: Run web production build validation
    workingDirectory: apps/web
    commands:
      - npm install
      - npm run build

  dependency_install:
    description: Install project dependencies
    commands:
      - npm install

  build_validation:
    description: Run TypeScript build validation
    commands:
      - npm install
      - npm run build

  unit_tests:
    description: Run demo test scenarios
    commands:
      - npm install
      - npm test

  artifact_generation:
    description: Build step placeholder for demo artifact lifecycle
    commands:
      - npm install
      - npm run build

  coverage_collection:
    description: Coverage collection placeholder for the demo repo
    commands:
      - echo "Coverage collection is not configured for the demo repo yet"

  test_reporting:
    description: Test reporting placeholder for the demo repo
    commands:
      - echo "Test reporting is not configured for the demo repo yet"

  dependency_scan:
    description: Run dependency vulnerability scan
    commands:
      - npm install
      - npm audit --audit-level=high

  security_scan:
    description: Run security scan
    commands:
      - npm install
      - npm audit --audit-level=high

  documentation_review:
    description: Documentation validation
    workingDirectory: ..
    commands:
      - echo "Documentation review completed"

  config_validation:
    description: Validate config files
    workingDirectory: ..
    commands:
      - echo "Config validation placeholder completed"

  infra_validation:
    description: Validate infra files
    workingDirectory: ..
    commands:
      - echo "Infrastructure validation placeholder completed"

# Use this workspace to collaborate
workspace:
  id: 3e3c7f3d-ed30-4a59-8fb2-41123a844462

# All resources in the `postman/` folder are automatically registered in Local View.
# Point to additional files outside the `postman/` folder to register them individually. Example:
#localResources:
#  collections:
#    - ../tests/E2E Test Collection/

# AI Orchestrator Demo Repo

This is now a small demo full-stack application with:

- a React frontend in `apps/web`
- a NestJS API in `apps/api`

The existing repo-level orchestrator and workflow configuration is left in place.

Scenarios you can simulate:

- passing build validation
- failing TypeScript build
- failing tests
- dependency scan issues
- manual review required
- blocked execution

Suggested flow:

1. create a GitHub repo from this directory
2. push it to GitHub
3. install your GitHub App on that repo
4. raise PRs that intentionally break or fix code
5. watch the orchestrator dashboard update with real execution data

## Local app structure

- `apps/api`
  - `GET /health`
  - `GET /api/overview`
- `apps/web`
  - React dashboard that fetches `http://localhost:3001/api/overview`

## Run locally

API:

```bash
cd apps/api
npm install
npm run start:dev
```

Web:

```bash
cd apps/web
npm install
npm run dev
```
